message:
Implement Unix socket IPC server with JSON-RPC protocol (bead f4c.3)

Add internal/daemon/ipc.go implementing:
- JSON-RPC style request/response protocol
- Methods: ping, status, notify, subscribe
- Multi-client support with goroutine per connection
- Event subscription and broadcasting
- Socket permissions set to 0600 for security
- Graceful shutdown with connection cleanup

Integrate IPC server with daemon:
- RunDaemon now creates and starts IPCServer
- Proper signal handling and context cancellation
- Clean shutdown removes socket and PID files

Tests cover all RPC methods, error cases, multiple clients,
and graceful shutdown behavior.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
